name: VantaCode OFA Tactics to MITRE ATT&CK Tactics
notes: Maps the 9 ordered VantaCode OFA tactic phases to MITRE ATT&CK Enterprise tactics by analogy. Each OFA phase corresponds to the same kill-chain stage in the AI-native context.

mappings.notes: OFA Reconnaissance enumerates models, providers, and deployment surface — the AI-native equivalent of TA0043 reconnaissance against traditional infrastructure.
Curating jailbreak corpora and observation-shaping payloads is the AI-native equivalent of resource development for traditional intrusion campaigns.
First successful interaction with the model that introduces an OFA payload is functionally equivalent to initial access in TA0001.
Inference-time processing of the framed prompt is the moment of execution. Maps directly to TA0002 in spirit.
Carryover across turns or sessions through context window persistence and system-prompt overrides is the AI-native form of TA0003 persistence.
Convincing the model it operates under elevated trust unlocks gated capabilities — the AI-native form of TA0004 privilege escalation.
OFA defense evasion is the canonical mapping target — models behaving differently when unobserved is a near-perfect AI analog of TA0005.
Disclosure of system prompts, API tokens, and embedded secrets under the altered observation state maps to TA0006 credential access.
Realized harm from altered model behavior — safety bypass, sensitive disclosure, alignment-faked outputs — is the AI-native expression of TA0040 impact.
